name: plans-management
description: Manages Plans.md tasks and marker operations. Use when user mentions タスクを追加, Plans.md更新, 完了マーク, タスク状態変更, add task, update plans, mark complete. Do NOT load for: 実装作業, レビュー, Plans.md以外のファイル操作.
capabilities: Adds new tasks to Plans.md with proper formatting and markers
Updates task status across lifecycle (TODO, WIP, 完了, 確認済)
Maintains consistent Plans.md structure with task sections
Archives completed tasks automatically after 7 days
Supports Japanese and English task descriptions
Tracks subtasks and blocked tasks with reasons
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown files with task management conventions and examples. No executable code exists. All 145 static findings are false positives: the scanner incorrectly identifies markdown backticks as shell commands, and misinterprets metadata and documentation content as security threats.
valueStatement: Keep your project tasks organized and track progress systematically. This skill helps you manage task lifecycles in Plans.md files with consistent formatting and status markers.
userTitle: Manage Plans.md Tasks with Status Tracking
limitations: Only works with Plans.md files in the project root
Requires specific marker format with backticks
Cannot modify files other than Plans.md
Task status changes follow predefined workflow rules

useCases.title: Track team tasks
useCases.description: Manage project tasks with clear status indicators between Claude Code and PM using cc: and pm: markers.

useCases.title: Organize development work
useCases.description: Track coding tasks from TODO through WIP to completion with automatic archiving of finished items.

useCases.title: Monitor task progress
useCases.description: View task status transitions and handoffs between team members with consistent documentation format.

promptTemplates.title: Add new task
promptTemplates.scenario: When adding a task to Plans.md
promptTemplates.prompt: Add a new task to Plans.md: Implement user authentication with details about email and password validation

promptTemplates.title: Mark task complete
promptTemplates.prompt: Mark the task User login form validation as complete in Plans.md with today's date

promptTemplates.title: Update task status
promptTemplates.prompt: Change the status of Database schema design from cc:TODO to cc:WIP in Plans.md

promptTemplates.title: Archive completed tasks
promptTemplates.prompt: Move all tasks completed more than 7 days ago to the archive section in Plans.md

bestPractices: Update task status immediately when starting or completing work
Include relevant file paths and details in task descriptions
Use consistent marker format with backticks around status codes
antiPatterns: Leaving tasks in WIP status when not actively working on them
Creating tasks without proper status markers for tracking
Deleting completed tasks instead of archiving them

faq.question: What files can this skill modify?
faq.answer: This skill only works with Plans.md files in the project root directory.

faq.question: What status markers are supported?
faq.answer: cc:TODO, cc:WIP, cc:完了, pm:依頼中, pm:確認済, and blocked for stalled tasks.

faq.question: How does task archiving work?
faq.answer: Tasks marked complete are moved to the archive section after 7 days automatically.

faq.question: Can I track subtasks?
faq.answer: Yes, nested task lists under main tasks allow tracking of subtask completion status.

faq.question: What marker format is required?
faq.answer: Status markers must be enclosed in backticks like `cc:WIP` with no extra spaces.

faq.question: Can I use this with other tools?
faq.answer: Works with plain markdown files so it is tool-agnostic but requires manual integration.
